title: Botrys boscianus

The exact classification of Botrys boscianus may vary depending on the source, but it is generally considered to be a member of the order Celastrales. As a member of the Celastraceae family, Botrys boscianus is closely related to other plants in this family, such as the staff vines and the bittersweet nightshade. Further research may be necessary to confirm the exact classification of this species.
